action.reasoning: Observation: 10-model ensemble trained successfully with val AUCs ranging from 0.7433 to 0.7491. Previous ensemble (5 models) achieved val AUC 0.7503. The error in train_more_ensemble.py was only in the evaluation code (concatenating 2D arrays), not affecting the saved models. Best test AUC is 0.7485. Analysis: The 10 models should provide better ensemble diversity. I should update predict.py to use weighted averaging based on val AUCs (higher-performing models get more weight), then submit eval immediately. Remaining time ~15 min. Decision: Fix predict.py with weighted ensemble, submit eval.
